title: LIVE: NEW Mythos 5.1?
summary: Julian Goldie SEO promotes an Agent OS product through a live streaming session. The content focuses on building agentic operating systems and monetizing AI tools for time and cost savings.
writeup: This live session from Julian Goldie SEO promotes an Agent OS product, centered on building agentic operating systems and monetizing AI tools for time and cost savings. It covers AI agents and agentic workflows as the foundation of the pitch. The takeaway is that the stream functions as a product promotion for an agentic operating system framed around efficiency gains.
